description: ChallengeModal hostname portability. The pressure-test and discuss actions hardcode http://127.0.0.1:4001 and 4002 (ChallengeModal.jsx:36,196,227) instead of the hostname-aware wsFetch the rest of the UI uses, so the entire pressure-test feature breaks on any non-localhost deploy (remote, staging, Docker) and fails to console.error only. Route these calls through wsFetch / the resolved host.

completions.notes: COCKPIT-2 hostname portability: relative wsFetch (4001) + agentServerUrl (4002) + error toasts. UI 161 + tracker 100 green; Codex CLEAN.
